Class InitConfig

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.InitConfig
public class InitConfig extends Object
an instance of this class describes the initial configuration of the prover. This includes sorts, functions, heuristics, and variables namespaces, information on the underlying java model, and a set of rules.

  • Constructor Details

    • InitConfig

      public InitConfig(Services services)

  • Method Details

    • getServices

      public final Services getServices()
      returns the Services of this initial configuration providing access to the used program model
      Returns:
      the Services of this initial configuration

    • getProfile

      public Profile getProfile()

    • addCategoryDefaultChoice

      public boolean addCategoryDefaultChoice(@NonNull String category, @NonNull String choice)
      Adds a default option for a category. It does override previous default choices.
      Returns:
      true if the default was successfully set

    • addCategory2DefaultChoices

      public void addCategory2DefaultChoices(@NonNull Map<String,String> init)
      Adds default choices given in init. Not overriding previous default choices.

    • setTaclet2Builder

      public void setTaclet2Builder(HashMap<Taclet, TacletBuilder<? extends Taclet>> taclet2Builder)

    • getTaclet2Builder

      public HashMap<Taclet, TacletBuilder<? extends Taclet>> getTaclet2Builder()
      Taclets are constructed using TacletBuilders this map contains the pair of a taclet and its builder which is important as goals of a taclet may depend of the selected choices. Instead of creating all possible combinations in advance this is done by demand
      Returns:
      the map from a taclet to its builder

    • setActivatedChoices

      public void setActivatedChoices(ImmutableSet<Choice> activatedChoices)
      sets the set of activated choices of this initial configuration. For categories without a specified choice the default choice contained in category2DefaultChoice is added.

    • getActivatedChoices

      public ImmutableSet<Choice> getActivatedChoices()
      Returns the choices which are currently active. For getting the active choices for a specific proof, getChoices in de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Proof has to be used.

    • addTaclets

      public void addTaclets(Collection<Taclet> tacs)

    • setTaclets

      public void setTaclets(ImmutableList<Taclet> tacs)

    • setTaclets

      public void setTaclets(Collection<Taclet> tacs)

    • getTaclets

      public ImmutableList<Taclet> getTaclets()

    • lookupActiveTaclet

      public Taclet lookupActiveTaclet(Name name)

    • activatedTaclets

      public Collection<Taclet> activatedTaclets()
      returns the activated taclets of this initial configuration

    • builtInRules

      public ImmutableList<BuiltInRule> builtInRules()
      returns the built-in rules of this initial configuration

    • registerRule

      public void registerRule(Rule r, RuleJustification j)
      registers a rule with the given justification at the justification managing RuleJustification object of this environment.

    • registerRuleIntroducedAtNode

      public void registerRuleIntroducedAtNode(RuleApp r, Node node, boolean isAxiom)

    • registerRules

      public void registerRules(Iterable<? extends Rule> s, RuleJustification j)
      registers a list of rules with the given justification at the justification managing RuleJustification object of this environment. All rules of the list are given the same justification.

    • getJustifInfo

      public RuleJustificationInfo getJustifInfo()
      returns the object managing the rules in this environment and their justifications. The object is unique to this environment.

    • createTacletIndex

      public TacletIndex createTacletIndex()
      returns a newly created taclet index for the set of activated taclets contained in this initial configuration

    • createBuiltInRuleIndex

      public BuiltInRuleIndex createBuiltInRuleIndex()
      returns a new created index for built in rules (at the moment immutable list)

    • namespaces

      public NamespaceSet namespaces()
      returns the namespaces of this initial configuration

    • funcNS

      public Namespace<@NonNull Function> funcNS()
      returns the function namespace of this initial configuration.
      Returns:
      a non-null namespace

    • sortNS

      public Namespace<@NonNull Sort> sortNS()
      returns the sort namespace of this initial configuration

    • ruleSetNS

      public Namespace<@NonNull RuleSet> ruleSetNS()
      returns the heuristics namespace of this initial configuration

      returns the variable namespace of this initial configuration

      public Namespace<@NonNull IProgramVariable> progVarNS()
      returns the program variable namespace of this initial configuration

      public Namespace<@NonNull Choice> choiceNS()
      returns the choice namespace of this initial configuration

    • setSettings

      public void setSettings(ProofSettings newSettings)

      public ProofSettings getSettings()

    • copy

      public InitConfig copy()
      returns a copy of this initial configuration copying the namespaces, the contained JavaInfo while using the immutable set of taclets in the copy

      public InitConfig deepCopy()
      returns a copy of this initial configuration copying the namespaces, the contained JavaInfo while using the immutable set of taclets in the copy

      returns a copy of this initial configuration copying the namespaces, the contained JavaInfo while using the immutable set of taclets in the copy

    • activateChoice

      public void activateChoice(Choice choice)
      Enforce the given choice. Remove choices of the same category from the current set.
